name: Baked-on Decorator's Frosting
recipeInstructions: Mix flour and butter until smooth. Stir in hot water and, if desired, 2-3 drops of food coloring. Place the mixture in a decorator's tube with a #3 writing tip. Outline, write or make designs on unbaked rolled cookies. Bake cookies as directed in recipes. Enough for 2-3 dozen cookies.
